title: phellodendron sachalinense
intro: Phellodendron sachalinense, also known as the Manchurian cork tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Northeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Phellodendron sachalinense is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
